name: way-stack
description: Meta-plugin that bootstraps a full Claude Code dev stack: master orchestrator, PARA + Karpathy LLM Wiki vault, SDD agent factory (full framework w/ Mega Prompt), fleet monitor + deploy-project + shinen-design + scrapling-official skills, session hooks, and one-command install of 5 upstream plugins + claude-mem (auto-memory) + caveman (terse mode) + graphify (knowledge-graph MCP), 7 design skills, bundled handoff skill, and 3 optional frameworks (GSD 90+ skills, BMAD v6, gstack).
